name: Shizune
description: Shizune is the aid of Tsunade. A competent combatant using poisons and needles, she is also a highly skilled medic who is able to heal her allies.

skills.name: Prepared Needle Shot
skills.description: Shizune shoots hidden needles at one enemy dealing 15 piercing damage to them. During 'Poison Mist', this skill will be improved and will make an enemy receive 25% more damage from harmful skills for 1 turn.

skills.name: Poison Mist
skills.description: Shizune breaths a poison cloud on one enemy who takes 12 affliction damage for 3 turns. During this time, 'Prepared Needle Shot' will improved and will make an enemy receive 25% more damage from all harmful skills for 1 turn.

skills.name: Healing Resuscitation Regeneration
skills.description: Using this advanced healing technique, Shizune heals one ally for 35 health and removes all enemy affliction skills from them.

skills.name: Shizune Dodge
skills.description: This skill makes Shizune invulnerable for 1 turn.
